economic_notes: First Nation has 33% ownership in A.C. Forestry Ltd. and interest in A.C. Realty Ltd., both accounted for under modified equity method. A.C. Forestry has $1,685,000 demand loan at prime plus 3.55%. First Nation provided guarantee for full amount.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for investments in A.C. Forestry Ltd. and A.C. Realty Ltd. (GBEs under modified equity method). No budget was prepared or approved for fiscal year 2022, which is also noted as a basis for qualification under PSAS. CMHC Housing Fund is consolidated. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($11,150,584) + CMHC ($366,601) + ACTC ($365,329) + Living Sky School Division ($155,000) + First Nations Trust ($139,369) + Northern Lights Community Development ($93,676) + ACFS ($15,000) = $12,285,559. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers = $11,144,196 - $12,285,559 = negative, indicating OSR lines (land leases, rent, admin fees, interest) are partially offset by revenue deferral. Net financial position is net financial debt of $1,759,159. Expenses include Economic Development ($7,950) and Community Services ($1,823,303) and Capital ($344,039) not separately mapped to all fields.
